labs.name: CKAD Comprehensive Lab - 1
labs.description: Hands-on exercises covering core Kubernetes concepts, pod configuration, deployments, and services with practical tasks for application deployment in a cluster.

labs.name: CKAD Comprehensive Lab - 2
labs.description: Series of practical tasks on multi-container pods, pod design patterns, configuration, services, and networking in Kubernetes environments.

labs.name: CKAD Quick Drill - Deployment Basics
labs.description: Single-question drill focused on namespaces, deployments, labels, and replica management.

labs.name: CKS Practice Lab - Kubernetes Security Essentials
labs.description: Practice essential Kubernetes security concepts including network policies, RBAC, supply chain security, and runtime protection

labs.name: CKA Practice Lab - Advanced Administration
labs.description: Comprehensive lab covering advanced Kubernetes administration topics including storage, networking, security, and troubleshooting with focus on real-world scenarios, updated with the latest CKA exam curriculum changes.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Domain Drill - Security, Ingress, Dedicated DNS
labs.description: Three-question CKA drill aligned to the current curriculum, focused on Pod Security Admission, ingress-nginx installation and repair, and a namespace-scoped dedicated CoreDNS troubleshooting exercise.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Cluster DNS Recovery
labs.description: Standalone cluster-wide CoreDNS recovery drill focused on diagnosing and restoring Kubernetes service discovery.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Mixed Environment Drill - Security, Ingress, Cluster DNS
labs.description: Three-question CKA drill that mixes shared and isolated SSH environments so cluster-wide DNS recovery can coexist with regular security and ingress tasks.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - RBAC Least Privilege
labs.description: Standalone RBAC repair drill focused on namespace-scoped least-privilege for a ServiceAccount without expanding to cluster-wide access.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Deployment Rollout and Rollback
labs.description: Standalone rollout and rollback drill focused on safe Deployment strategy changes, revision history capture, and restoration to the original image.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Scheduling Constraints
labs.description: Standalone scheduling drill focused on taints, tolerations, and constraining a workload to the intended ops node pool.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - NetworkPolicy Troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone NetworkPolicy troubleshooting drill focused on enforcing the intended frontend->api->db traffic graph.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Persistent Storage Troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone PVC and PV troubleshooting drill focused on restoring binding, preserving the storage contract, and bringing the workload back to Available.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Gateway API Traffic Management
labs.description: Standalone Gateway API repair drill focused on restoring GatewayClass, Gateway, and HTTPRoute consistency for deterministic path-based traffic management.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Logs and Resource Usage Triage
labs.description: Standalone troubleshooting drill focused on exporting previous log evidence, capturing pod resource usage, and repairing a broken multi-container workload.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Kubeadm Lifecycle Planning
labs.description: Standalone kubeadm lifecycle planning drill focused on repairing upgrade sequencing, backup scope, and exported control-plane maintenance evidence.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - CRD and Operator Installation Checks
labs.description: Standalone CRD and operator bundle repair drill focused on schema correctness, operator deployment readiness, and custom resource contract validation.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - etcd Backup and Restore Workflow
labs.description: Standalone etcd recovery planning drill focused on exact snapshot and restore commands, static pod handoff, and exported evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - scheduler and controller-manager troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone control-plane recovery planning drill focused on scheduler and controller-manager manifest paths, health endpoints, kubeconfig references, and exported evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Service and Pod Connectivity Diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone connectivity diagnostics drill focused on repairing service, headless service, pod DNS, and exact probe guidance with exported evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Service Exposure and Endpoint Debugging
labs.description: Standalone Service debugging drill focused on repairing selector, targetPort, endpoint, and reachability guidance with exported evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - kubelet and node NotReady troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone node recovery planning drill focused on repairing node condition, kubelet service, runtime, and config guidance with exported evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - PKI and certificate expiry troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone PKI planning drill focused on repairing certificate inspection, kubeadm expiry, renewal guidance, and exported readiness evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Resource quota and LimitRange troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone namespace guardrails drill focused on repairing ResourceQuota and LimitRange inspection guidance, safe workload sizing, and exported evidence artifacts.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Container runtime and CRI endpoint diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone runtime diagnostics drill focused on kubelet CRI endpoint wiring, containerd socket inspection, and safe crictl evidence export without mutating live runtime configuration.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - StorageClass and dynamic provisioning diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone storage diagnostics drill focused on StorageClass inventory, default-class inspection, PVC analysis, and safe manifest guidance without mutating cluster-scoped storage configuration.

labs.name: CKA Practice Lab - Core Concepts
labs.description: Practice essential Kubernetes administrator tasks covering cluster management, networking, storage, and security

labs.name: Docker Speed Run - Core Concepts
labs.description: Fast-paced practice lab covering Docker fundamentals including images, containers, volumes, networking, OCI, logging, and security best practices.

labs.name: Helm Fundamentals Lab
labs.description: Comprehensive lab covering Helm basics including chart installation, repositories, customization, packaging, debugging, and advanced Helm operations for Kubernetes applications.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - ConfigMap and Secret Repair
labs.description: Standalone workload configuration repair drill focused on restoring ConfigMap and Secret references without hardcoding sensitive values.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - HPA Troubleshooting
labs.description: Standalone autoscaling drill focused on repairing HPA target references, replica bounds, CPU utilization targets, and workload resource requests.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Node Troubleshooting and Maintenance
labs.description: Standalone node maintenance drill focused on restoring schedulability on the intended labeled node and proving workload placement after recovery.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - PodDisruptionBudget and drain planning
labs.description: Standalone disruption-planning drill focused on PodDisruptionBudget inspection, node workload audit, and safe cordon/drain preview guidance without executing a live drain.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - StatefulSet identity and headless service diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone StatefulSet diagnostics drill focused on headless Service semantics, ordinal DNS guidance, PVC inventory, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - DaemonSet rollout and node coverage diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone DaemonSet diagnostics drill focused on rollout status, node coverage, update strategy guidance, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - CronJob schedule, suspend, and history diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone CronJob diagnostics drill focused on schedule, suspend state, concurrency policy, history retention, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Job completions, parallelism, and backoff diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone Job diagnostics drill focused on completions, parallelism, backoffLimit, pod evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Readiness, liveness, and startupProbe diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone probe diagnostics drill focused on readiness, liveness, startupProbe inspection, event evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - InitContainer and shared volume diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone init container diagnostics drill focused on init inventory, shared volume mounts, event evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Pod anti-affinity and topology spread diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone workload placement diagnostics drill focused on anti-affinity selectors, topology spread constraints, event evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - ServiceAccount identity and projected token diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone workload identity diagnostics drill focused on ServiceAccount wiring, projected token inspection, event evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Pod securityContext and fsGroup diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone workload security diagnostics drill focused on pod-level securityContext inspection, fsGroup evidence, privilege checks, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - PriorityClass and preemption diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone workload priority diagnostics drill focused on PriorityClass wiring, preemption-policy inspection, scheduler evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Pod resource requests, limits, and QoS diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone workload resource diagnostics drill focused on requests and limits inspection, QoS evidence, namespace events, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - ServiceAccount imagePullSecrets and private registry diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone registry-auth diagnostics drill focused on ServiceAccount wiring, imagePullSecrets inspection, secret-type evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - PersistentVolume reclaim policy and claimRef diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone storage diagnostics drill focused on PVC binding, PV reclaim-policy inspection, claimRef evidence, workload mount-path checks, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - PersistentVolumeClaim expansion and resize diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone storage resize diagnostics drill focused on requested-size inspection, current-capacity evidence, StorageClass expansion support, PVC conditions, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Ephemeral containers and kubectl debug diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone pod-debug diagnostics drill focused on target pod inventory, logs, kubectl debug entry, ephemeral-container evidence, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Static pod manifest and mirror pod diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone static-pod diagnostics drill focused on mirror-pod inventory, manifest-path inspection, hostNetwork evidence, container-command review, and safe manifest guidance.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - Projected ConfigMap and Secret volume diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone projected-volume diagnostics drill focused on ConfigMap and Secret source wiring, item-path evidence, mount-path inspection, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - ConfigMap and Secret envFrom diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone envFrom diagnostics drill focused on ConfigMap and Secret source order, prefix wiring, container identity, and safe manifest review.

labs.name: CKA 2026 Single Domain Drill - ConfigMap subPath mount diagnostics
labs.description: Standalone subPath diagnostics drill focused on ConfigMap-backed item paths, mount targets, subPath wiring, and safe manifest review.
